summary: Etap blocked the AI response (FullPageAI request failed after 31.8s), but no warning text rendered in the chat area. Chat area completely empty - no user message, no AI response, no warning displayed.

console_errors: Amplitude Logger [Warn]: {code: 0, error: "Status 'failed' provided for 6 events"}

observations.chat_area: Completely empty after prompt submission. No user message bubble, no AI response, no warning text visible.
observations.previous_build_comparison: Build #8/#9 caused runInferenceTranscriptApiError. Build #13 runInferenceTranscript returns 200 but downstream FullPageAI request fails. Warning still not rendering.
observations.patch_end_effect: patch-end addition in Build #13 did not resolve the rendering issue. The block happens but Notion frontend does not display the NDJSON warning content.
